title: Bufab default — Go API, SQLite, React, Tailwind

guidelines_for_agents: Backend: Go module, HTTP API (REST), structured logging, config via env.
Data: SQLite via GORM; use gorm.io/gorm and gorm.io/driver/sqlite; prefer modernc.org/sqlite when cgo_allowed is false.
Frontend: React (SPA or embedded); styling with Tailwind CSS; keep API client in a small typed layer.
Do not introduce a second primary database or ORM without updating this profile.
After file changes, run arch_validate_files with this slug and the changed paths.
validation_hints: go.mod present; GORM + sqlite driver imports consistent with sqlite_driver.
React and tailwind dependencies or config present when frontend files change.
No raw database/sql-only stack if orm is gorm — use GORM for persistence.
